description:
Introductions:
Do you intend to buy a high quality luggage rack? Then you can stop in here! This Portable Metal Luggage Rack is a creative and practical household product, both functional and beautiful luggage rack. It is made of high quality material, safety and durable for long term use. It can be used to hold your luggage easily. The luggage rack is so lightweight that you can move it anytime you like. Also it features fashionable and concise design, and easy to use. It is a nice way to store your luggage! Why not get one?

Features:
1. It is made of high quality material
2. Elegant, fine workmanship, beautiful and fashion
3. Brand new and high quality
4. It will be your best choice
5. A simple and convenient articles for daily use

 


Note:
1.When receiving the goods, please confirm the product according to the listing of instructions. Once you find Less pieces, please provide relevant pictures to contact us. We will deal it in the time.
2.Please install goods with the instruction manual.
3.It is recommended that the installation should not be too tight to adjust easily. After the structure is installed, firm the interface for more stability.

Specifications:
1. Material: Stoving Varnish Finish Metal Tubes & Heavy Duty Nylon Straps
2. Color: Black
3. Dimensions: (26.77 x 15.75 x 22)" / (68 x 40 x 56)cm (L x W x H)
4. Weight: 4.1 lbs / 1.86 kg
5. Max Weight Capacity: 100 lbs / 50 kg

 

Package Includes:
1 x Metal Luggage Rack
1 x Instruction
